types:type.name: samplemetadata
types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0
type samplemetadata = {| id: Number {"typeId": "int"}, name: String, age: Number {"typeId": "int"}, email: String, isActive: Boolean, skills: Array<String>, address: {| street: String, city: String, zipCode: String |} |} {"example": "{\\\"id\\\":101,\\\"name\\\":\\\"John Doe\\\",\\\"age\\\":28,\\\"email\\\":\\\"john.doe@example.com\\\",\\\"isActive\\\":true,\\\"skills\\\":[\\\"Java\\\",\\\"Python\\\",\\\"SQL\\\"],\\\"address\\\":{\\\"street\\\":\\\"123 Main St\\\",\\\"city\\\":\\\"New York\\\",\\\"zipCode\\\":\\\"10001\\\"}}"}
